body.raw: {"query":"query getGamesByGameDate($startDate: String!, $endDate: String!, $timezone: Int!, $sortOrder: SortOrder, $status: [Status], $stateStatus: [StateStatus], $leagues: [StatsLeagues]) { getGamesByGameDate(startDate: $startDate, endDate: $endDate, timezone: $timezone, sortOrder: $sortOrder, status: $status, stateStatus: $stateStatus, leagues: $leagues) { away { abbreviation draws logo losses market mascot name wins } gameDate { epoch iso8501 } gameProgress { clock { hours milliseconds minutes seconds stoppage } currentPeriod displayPrimary displaySecondary totalPeriods } home { abbreviation draws logo losses market mascot name wins } id name score { away home } sourceGameId sport { league sport } sportradar_id stateStatus status weekId } }","variables":{"startDate":"2026-02-20","endDate":"2026-02-20","timezone":1,"sortOrder":"demo-sortOrder","status":"demo-status","stateStatus":"demo-stateStatus","leagues":"demo-leagues"}}

{"query":"query getGamesByGameDate($startDate: String!, $endDate: String!, $timezone: Int!, $sortOrder: SortOrder, $status: [Status], $stateStatus: [StateStatus], $leagues: [StatsLeagues]) { getGamesByGameDate(startDate: $startDate, endDate: $endDate, timezone: $timezone, sortOrder: $sortOrder, status: $status, stateStatus: $stateStatus, leagues: $leagues) { away { abbreviation draws logo losses market mascot name wins } gameDate { epoch iso8501 } gameProgress { clock { hours milliseconds minutes seconds stoppage } currentPeriod displayPrimary displaySecondary totalPeriods } home { abbreviation draws logo losses market mascot name wins } id name score { away home } sourceGameId sport { league sport } sportradar_id stateStatus status weekId } }","variables":{"startDate":"2026-02-20","endDate":"2026-02-20","timezone":1,"sortOrder":"demo-sortOrder","status":"demo-status","stateStatus":"demo-stateStatus","leagues":"demo-leagues"}}

{"query":"query getGamesByGameIds($gameIds: [String]!) { getGamesByGameIds(gameIds: $gameIds) { away { abbreviation draws logo losses market mascot name wins } gameDate { epoch iso8501 } gameProgress { clock { hours milliseconds minutes seconds stoppage } currentPeriod displayPrimary displaySecondary totalPeriods } home { abbreviation draws logo losses market mascot name wins } id name score { away home } sourceGameId sport { league sport } sportradar_id stateStatus status weekId } }","variables":{"gameIds":"id-12345"}}

{"query":"query getScores($timezone: Int!, $date: String, $league: StatsLeagues, $context: String, $locale: String, $tags: [Int], $slugs: [String]) { getScores(timezone: $timezone, date: $date, league: $league, context: $context, locale: $locale, tags: $tags, slugs: $slugs) { calendarNavigation { previous { name href queryParameters { date league } } next { name href queryParameters { date league } } current { name href queryParameters { date league } } } leagues { id league name current slug tag { permalink } queryParameters { context league date } children { id league name current slug tag { permalink } queryParameters { context league date } children { id league name current slug tag queryParameters children href } href } href } gameGroups { name current games { name id descriptions { text } gameDate sport site league status boxScore gamecast teamOne { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors periodScores virtual } teamTwo { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors periodScores virtual } progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } gameState { isRedZone balls strikes outs runners } current gameEndDate squadRide { id outcome } metadata { name about startDate endDate status location } odds gamecastInformation maxPeriodScores } events { name subName nameLabels { text } id descriptions { text } gameDate sport site league status type boxScore gamecast stream participants { headers entries } progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } gameState { isRedZone balls strikes outs runners } current gameEndDate metadata { name about startDate endDate status location } odds gamecastInformation } } bettingLink { id success ctaText logo logoNight clickUrl disclaimerText disclaimerUrl showLinkout partner betting attributionText } hash } }","variables":{"timezone":1,"date":"2026-02-20","league":"demo-league","context":"Sample text","locale":"demo-locale","tags":1,"slugs":"demo-slug-001"}}

league: $league, context: $context, locale: $locale, tags: $tags, slugs: $slugs) { calendarNavigation { previous { name href queryParameters { date league } } next { name href queryParameters { date league } } current { name href queryParameters { date league } } } leagues { id league name current slug tag { permalink } queryParameters { context league date } children { id league name current slug tag { permalink } queryParameters { context league date } children { id league name current slug tag queryParameters children href } href } href } gameGroups { name current games { name id descriptions { text } gameDate sport site league status boxScore gamecast teamOne { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors periodScores virtual } teamTwo { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors periodScores virtual } progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } gameState { isRedZone balls strikes outs runners } current gameEndDate squadRide { id outcome } metadata { name about startDate endDate status location } odds gamecastInformation maxPeriodScores } events { name subName nameLabels { text } id descriptions { text } gameDate sport site league status type boxScore gamecast stream participants { headers entries } progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } gameState { isRedZone balls strikes outs runners } current gameEndDate metadata { name about startDate endDate status location } odds gamecastInformation } } bettingLink { id success ctaText logo logoNight clickUrl disclaimerText disclaimerUrl showLinkout partner betting attributionText } hash } }","variables":{"timezone":1,"date":"2026-02-20","league":"demo-league","context":"Sample text","locale":"demo-locale","tags":1,"slugs":"demo-slug-001"}}

{"query":"query getStandings($permalink: String!, $season: Int) { getStandings(permalink: $permalink, season: $season) { slug tag { permalink } season name standingGroupings { title entries { title current separator { color index } headers { title } teams { color number logo name superscript current values returnColor prefixSuperscript slug tag } keys { value color returnColor } } adPlacement { adId index } } } }","variables":{"permalink":"demo-permalink","season":2026}}

{"query":"query getStandings($permalink: String!, $season: Int) { getStandings(permalink: $permalink, season: $season) { slug tag { permalink } season name standingGroupings { title entries { title current separator { color index } headers { title } teams { color number logo name superscript current values returnColor prefixSuperscript slug tag } keys { value color returnColor } } adPlacement { adId index } } } }","variables":{"permalink":"demo-permalink","season":2026}}

{"query":"query getGamecastBySlug($slug: String!) { getGamecastBySlug(slug: $slug) { tag { hash slug } slug scoreLeaderboard { name subName nameLabels { text } id descriptions { text } gameDate sport site league status type boxScore gamecast stream participants { headers { value } entries { number logo name abbrev isWinner values } } progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } gameState { isRedZone balls strikes outs runners { first second third } } current gameEndDate metadata { name about startDate endDate status location { name city state zip country } } odds gamecastInformation } gameDate linescore { gameState { balls batter { atBats average player totalHits } outs pitcher { player totalPitches totalStrikeouts } runners { first second third } strikes } headers { value } summaryHeaders { value } teamOne { colors logo name record summaryValues { value } values { value } } teamTwo { colors logo name record summaryValues { value } values { value } } title } podium { entries { logo name place result subResult } title } raceInfo { distance distanceUnit laps name status type } scoreboard { gameDate progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } teamOne { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors { abbrev logo name rank slug team } periodScores { number score subscore type } virtual } teamTwo { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors { abbrev logo name rank slug team } periodScores { number score subscore type } virtual } } sport status venue { location stadium weatherEmoji weatherPrimary weatherSecondary } jsonResponse } }","variables":{"slug":"demo-slug-001"}}

body.raw: {"query":"query getSchedule($slug: String!, $timezone: Int, $season: Int) { getSchedule(slug: $slug, timezone: $timezone, season: $season) { adPlacement { adId gameRowIndex groupIndex repeatOffset } league name slug scheduleGroupings { current title entries { group current date slug homeAway isoUtcDatetime opponent opponentLogo resultDescription startTimeTbd status location { name city state zip country } resultCode { color colorNight value } ticketInfo { url minPrice } } key { value color returnColor } link { title type value } } } }","variables":{"slug":"demo-slug-001","timezone":1,"season":2026}}

{"query":"query getSchedule($slug: String!, $timezone: Int, $season: Int) { getSchedule(slug: $slug, timezone: $timezone, season: $season) { adPlacement { adId gameRowIndex groupIndex repeatOffset } league name slug scheduleGroupings { current title entries { group current date slug homeAway isoUtcDatetime opponent opponentLogo resultDescription startTimeTbd status location { name city state zip country } resultCode { color colorNight value } ticketInfo { url minPrice } } key { value color returnColor } link { title type value } } } }","variables":{"slug":"demo-slug-001","timezone":1,"season":2026}}

{"query":"query getGameCastByTagUUID($uuid: String!) { getGameCastByTagUUID(uuid: $uuid) { tag { hash slug } slug scoreLeaderboard { name subName nameLabels { text } id descriptions { text } gameDate sport site league status type boxScore gamecast stream participants { headers { value } entries { number logo name abbrev isWinner values } } progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } gameState { isRedZone balls strikes outs runners { first second third } } current gameEndDate metadata { name about startDate endDate status location { name city state zip country } } odds gamecastInformation } gameDate linescore { gameState { balls batter { atBats average player totalHits } outs pitcher { player totalPitches totalStrikeouts } runners { first second third } strikes } headers { value } summaryHeaders { value } teamOne { colors logo name record summaryValues { value } values { value } } teamTwo { colors logo name record summaryValues { value } values { value } } title } podium { entries { logo name place result subResult } title } raceInfo { distance distanceUnit laps name status type } scoreboard { gameDate progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } teamOne { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors { abbrev logo name rank slug team } periodScores { number score subscore type } virtual } teamTwo { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors { abbrev logo name rank slug team } periodScores { number score subscore type } virtual } } sport status venue { location stadium weatherEmoji weatherPrimary weatherSecondary } jsonResponse } }","variables":{"uuid":"id-12345"}}

{"query":"query getGameCastByTagUUID($uuid: String!) { getGameCastByTagUUID(uuid: $uuid) { tag { hash slug } slug scoreLeaderboard { name subName nameLabels { text } id descriptions { text } gameDate sport site league status type boxScore gamecast stream participants { headers { value } entries { number logo name abbrev isWinner values } } progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } gameState { isRedZone balls strikes outs runners { first second third } } current gameEndDate metadata { name about startDate endDate status location { name city state zip country } } odds gamecastInformation } gameDate linescore { gameState { balls batter { atBats average player totalHits } outs pitcher { player totalPitches totalStrikeouts } runners { first second third } strikes } headers { value } summaryHeaders { value } teamOne { colors logo name record summaryValues { value } values { value } } teamTwo { colors logo name record summaryValues { value } values { value } } title } podium { entries { logo name place result subResult } title } raceInfo { distance distanceUnit laps name status type } scoreboard { gameDate progress { network playPeriod playPeriodCondensed clock inningPhase round venue } teamOne { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors { abbrev logo name rank slug team } periodScores { number score subscore type } virtual } teamTwo { name shortName abbrev hasPossession rank isWinner logo score mainScore secondaryScore record odds colors permalink competitors { abbrev logo name rank slug team } periodScores { number score subscore type } virtual } } sport status venue { location stadium weatherEmoji weatherPrimary weatherSecondary } jsonResponse } }","variables":{"uuid":"id-12345"}}
